meaning: n.底切,牛腰部下侧嫩肉,砍口,削球vt.廉价出售,底切,雕出,从下边削球vi.底切
examples: We were able to undercut our European rivals by 5%.
Subsidies allow growers to undercut competitors and depress world prices.
So that undercut a lot of the gossip and rumors.
Many European farmers have opposed the agreement, fearing that they may be undercut by cheaper imports.
The FDA looked at tightening device rules in the early 1990s, but Congress undercut the effort.
